title: [codex] add inception mercury model
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds Inception/Mercury 2 as a direct paid-only text provider model with aliases, pricing, usage mapping, and secret propagation.
- Adds Inception brand logo support in the model catalog.
- Updates usage parsing for Inception cached input and reasoning token fields so billing/tracking stays aligned.
- Leaves FIM/edit endpoints out of scope for this PR.

Validation:
- `npx biome check --write` on touched source files
- `npx vitest run test/aliases.test.ts test/pricing-data.test.ts test/effective-prices.snapshot.test.ts`
- `npx vitest run test/usage-headers.test.ts test/model-permissions.test.ts test/media-cache.test.ts test/text-cache.test.ts test/billing-deduction.test.ts test/tracking-observability.test.ts`
- `npm run typecheck` in `gen.pollinations.ai`
- `git diff --check`

Follow-up validation after `paidOnly: true`:
- `npx biome check --write shared/registry/text.ts`
- `npx vitest run test/aliases.test.ts test/pricing-data.test.ts test/effective-prices.snapshot.test.ts`
- `npx vitest run test/model-permissions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

gist.headline: Mercury rising
gist.blurb: Added Inception's Mercury 2 to the text API. A new paid-only powerhouse for when your prompts need some serious reasoning.
gist.summary: Added Inception's Mercury 2 as a direct paid-only text model, including usage parsing for cached input and reasoning tokens.
gist.impact: Developers can now route text generation requests to Mercury 2, with full billing support for its advanced token tracking.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a glowing silver/mercury orb or a tiny planet Mercury, representing the new Inception Mercury 2 model.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses, inspecting a glowing, floating orb of liquid silver mercury. A chunky retro terminal in the background displays lime green (#ecf874) code blocks. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
